name: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z790 FORMULA ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - 2x Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 7 - 2” LIVEDASH OLED
